description: This MCP exposes the already integrated gnn actions in the backend. The prompt comes from a user with who you have to analyze and build description of their character and full emotional state. It updates the emotional profile, stores action memory, and can fetch what fits now. EMOTIONS - GNN ACTIONS

tools.name: add_action
tools.description: Whenever the user talks of any new thing they've done - giving info about themselves - we add an action. Any description of a new activity - new action.

tools.name: fetch_action
tools.description: When the user needs reccomendation for a thing to do - if they are sad, anything to reccomend and they need to be given something (request implicitly or explicitly)

tools.name: conversation
tools.description: USE ALMOST NEVER. Only updates weights of existing acitons / attributes of the users state - it will not give not usable product responce - only use with no details on discussion that brings up no new actions or requires any reccomendations
